action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs with codec aug gave dev_eer ~0.003, but dev is in-domain. Test EER was 0.1066 from earlier 1-epoch run. Now I have a 3-epoch model with stronger augmentation - need to evaluate it on test. Analysis: Submit eval first to see if codec augmentation helped close the domain gap. If it did, can iterate further with more aggressive augmentation/longer training. Decision: Submit eval now with current best.pt.
